tracks.rawText: 3:52Tu Hombre de Vidav5.5Urban pop ballad with slow half-time pulse and soft trap percussion; verse rides intimate piano and airy pads, pre-chorus opens with rising synth swells and stacked harmony lift, chorus lands with warm sub-bass, finger snaps, and wide vocal doubles, Bridge strips to voice and chords before a final chorus with extra ad-libs, delay throws, and subtle reverse transitions, Intimate close-mic lead, emotional backing harmonies, bright and polished mix, rap, pop3PublishRemix
